name: hud_ui_panel_destructor
description: HudUiPanel::Destructor installs the panel ftable, destroys any textPick image, releases the font object, and leaves the object on the common ftable.
known_limits: The existing smoke covers the no-owned-image/no-font path through ScalarDeletingDestructor; broader owned-resource behavior is covered by zVid image destroy provider tests and should be revisited in the panel class binary-safe pass.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Destructor@HudUiPanel@@QAEXXZ at 0x4bab40 still fails: 86 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 103 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows ftable install to g_HudUiPanel_FTable, optional zVid_Image::Destroy for textPick, DeleteObject on hFont, and final ftable install to g_HudUiCommon_FTable.
The native panel scalar-deleting destructor smoke validates that the destructor returns through the scalar wrapper and leaves the common ftable on an empty panel.
